notes: Top 25 models by MachineryTrader listing frequency â€” 78.1% marketplace coverage.
8 FAMILY/SERIES records (manual_review, no auto-fill). 17 EXACT model records (locked specs where available).
Family models: John Deere 624, CAT 966, Volvo L70, Volvo L90, Volvo L60, Komatsu WA320, Komatsu WA380, Case 721.
Bucket capacity marked manual_review across all records due to multi-config variation.
Source: marketplace listing aggregation + OEM spec sheets. Verify against serial decode before listing.

v1.0.2 (2026-03-19): Full validation pass. 6 records patched: caterpillar_950m, volvo_l70h, case_621g, volvo_l60h, hyundai_hl940, komatsu_wa320_8, komatsu_wa380_8. Major issues: cross-model contamination (521G specs in 621G, D4D/wrong HP in L60H, WA320 bucket in WA380-8), wrong HP/OW values (950M, HL940, WA320-8), wrong transmission type (WA320-8 HST not Powershift), wrong engine (L60H/L70H D4D/D4J vs D6J). All incorrect locked values either corrected or demoted to manual_review.

v1.0.3 (2026-03-19): Final pre-lock pass on 3 records: volvo_l70h, case_621g, komatsu_wa380_8. volvo_l70h: HP locked at 170 (OEM PDF confirmed gross=net=170), OW corrected to 30,880 lb, bucket corrected 2.1m3â†’2.75yd3, fuel/hydraulic flow corrected from OEM. case_621g: CRITICAL â€” net_power_hp corrected 172â†’151 (172 is gross, not net), gross_power_hp=172 now locked, bucket restored to 2.75 yd3, secondary specs restored from OEM source. komatsu_wa380_8: net_power_hp corrected 190â†’191 (exact OEM), OW corrected to 40,532 lb (OEM base), bucket_capacity_cy restored to 4.3 yd3 (OEM standard GP), non-OEM-confirmed secondary specs nulled.

v1.1.0 (schema normalization pass): Added Wheel Loader V1 normalized fields (horsepower_hp, operating_weight_lbs, bucket_capacity_cu_yd_std, hinge_pin_height_in, tire_size_std, engine_manufacturer) mapped from legacy fields. No records added or removed. No existing values modified.

v1.2.0 (2026-04-09): Full dataset quality pass. Removed 4 duplicate/legacy fields (operating_weight_lb, net_power_hp, bucket_capacity_cu_yd_std, hinge_pin_height_in) and renamed 4 legacy fields to canonical pipeline names (bucket_capacity_cyâ†’bucket_capacity_yd3, breakout_force_lbfâ†’breakout_force_lbs, engine_manufacturerâ†’engine_make, gross_power_hpâ†’horsepower_gross_hp). All 25 records updated. No spec values modified. See patch log v1_2 for full detail.
final_lock_notes: komatsu_wa380_8 secondary specs intentionally null pending deeper OEM spec extraction

notes: H-series production ~2014 onward. Current production as of 2025.
Source: Volvo CE OEM product guide PDF (volvoce.com, product_guide_l70h_t4f_en_22_20062175_a.pdf, ref PV776-88049476).

HP normalization: Volvo D6J ISO 14396 gross = ISO 9249 net = 127 kW / 170 hp. Gross and net are identical for this engine at this rating. No derating. Both gross_power_hp and net_power_hp locked at 170.

operating_weight_lb = 30,880 lb (14.0 t per OEM header). Set to manual_review: LECTURA shows 13.7t (2016-2018) vs 13.96t (2019+); AllMachines cites 32,154 lb for fully equipped configs. Use 30,880 as base config floor.

bucket_capacity_cy = 2.75 yd3 (= 2.1 m3, base standard bucket per LECTURA consistent 2014-2025). Note: Volvo CE product page also references 2.3 m3 (3.0 yd3) STE P BOE config. Wide config range possible. manual_review required.
fuel_capacity_gal = 58.6 (222 L per OEM). Replaces prior unconfirmed 50 gal.
hydraulic_flow_gpm = 40.7 (154 L/min per OEM). Replaces prior unconfirmed 60 gpm.
transmission_type aligned to OEM label: 'Volvo Automatic Power Shift (APS) gear shifting system with fully automatic shifting 1-4 and mode selector'.
breakout_force_lbf, hinge_pin_height_ft, travel_speed_mph, tipping_load_straight_lb: nulled to manual_review. Not confirmed from OEM product guide; prior values were from contaminated spec set.

CRITICAL HP NOTE: gross_power_hp = 172 hp (128.3 kW). net_power_hp = 151 hp (112.7 kW). These are distinct. The figure '172 hp' appearing in dealer listings and marketing refers to GROSS, not net. Both are now correctly locked.
operating_weight_lb = 28,159 lb (12,773 kg). OEM confirmed. Config variations exist with optional counterweight; 28,159 is the standard equipped base weight.
bucket_capacity_cy = 2.75 yd3 (2.1 m3) is the standard GP bucket. Config range runs from ~1.75 yd3 (light material) to ~3.5+ yd3 (rehandling). manual_review required.

engine_model = FPT F4HFE613W. Suffix 'W' denotes Tier 4 Final SCR variant. Prior bad record used 'B' suffix (different emissions variant). MEDIUM confidence â€” verify suffix via serial decode before locking further.
tipping_load_straight_lb = 21,189 lb listed as 'Tipping Load' in source without straight/full-turn qualifier. Set MEDIUM / manual_review until qualification confirmed.
breakout_force_lbf = 25,471 lb (113.3 kN). OEM confirmed. Note: some dealer specs cite 24,942 lbf â€” minor config variation likely. 25,471 from structured OEM source preferred.

source_refs: Cat 966 GC Technical Specifications PDF — direct OEM spec sheet (teknoxgroup.com/fileadmin/user_upload/966_GC.pdf)
notes: Exact-model record for Cat 966 GC. Must not be conflated with or overwrite the caterpillar_966 family stub.
HP detail: horsepower_hp = 263 = SAE J1349 rated net @ 2,200 rpm. Net peak = 292 hp @ 1,600 rpm. Gross (SAE J1995) = 299 hp. MTM stores rated net.
GC variant uses Brazil MAR-1 / Tier 3-equivalent engine — intentionally de-rated vs. Cat 966 performance model. Do not conflate specs with 966H or 966M.
Operating weight: 47,569 lb with Triangle 26.5R25 L3 tires, standard counterweight, full fluids, operator, 5.25 yd3 GP bucket with BOCE.
Hinge pin (B-Pin) height: 4,256 mm per OEM spec = 13.96 ft (OEM states ~14 ft 0 in).
Travel speed: 22.9 mph = R4 max (36.9 km/h). Forward F4 = 34.8 km/h = 21.6 mph.
dump_clearance_ft and reach_at_dump_ft: present in OEM spec table but not retrieved this pass. Require second fetch targeting OEM spec pages 7+.
Exact-model record for Case 721G (G-series, Tier 4 Final, 2017-2020). Must not be conflated with or overwrite the case_721 family stub.
